channel.title: Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings

item.title: C# Enum to String: Conversion Patterns and Best Practices
item.description: Learn every C# enum to string conversion pattern: ToString, Enum.GetName, JsonStringEnumConverter, custom display names, and parsing strings back to enums safely. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/29/c-enum-to-string-conversion-patterns-and-best-practices

item.title: State Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: Build a complete state pattern real-world example in C# with a document workflow system featuring approval states, transitions, and guard conditions. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/29/state-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: C# Enum Flags: Combining Values with Bitwise Operations
item.description: Learn how C# enum flags work. Understand the [Flags] attribute, bitwise OR and AND, HasFlag(), and when to use a flags enum over a regular enum in .NET. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/28/c-enum-flags-combining-values-with-bitwise-operations

item.title: How to Implement Facade Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement facade pattern in C# with a step-by-step guide covering subsystem identification, interface design, and dependency injection setup. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/28/how-to-implement-facade-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: How to Use Enum in C#: Declaration, Values, and Best Practices
item.description: Learn how to use enum in C# from scratch. Covers declaring enums, assigning values, casting, comparing, iterating, and the best practices every C# developer should follow. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/27/how-to-use-enum-in-c-declaration-values-and-best-practices

item.title: State vs Strategy Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Compare state vs strategy pattern in C# with side-by-side code examples, key behavioral differences, and guidance on when to use each. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/27/state-vs-strategy-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: AI Career Fears Are Evolving -- Here's What I'm Hearing - Dev Leader Weekly 137
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I discuss the shifting landscape of AI-related career fears -- from being replaced to being left behind -- and how developers can navigate the change. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/27/ai-career-fears-are-evolving-heres-what-im-hearing-dev-leader-weekly-137

item.title: C# Enum: Complete Guide to Enumerations in .NET
item.description: Master C# enum with this complete guide. Learn to declare enums, use flags, convert to string, apply switch pattern matching, and follow .NET best practices. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/26/c-enum-complete-guide-to-enumerations-in-net

item.title: Facade Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the facade design pattern in C# with practical examples showing simplified interfaces, subsystem encapsulation, and clean API design. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/26/facade-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: Weekly Recap: C# Regex, State and Command Patterns, and Feature Slicing Apr 2026
item.description: This week covers complete guides on C# regular expressions, state pattern best practices, and command pattern real-world implementations. Plus feature slicing vs clean architecture, CQRS per feature, and C# string performance deep dives. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/26/weekly-recap-c-regex-state-and-command-patterns-and-feature-slicing-apr-2026

item.title: CQRS with Feature Slices in C#: Commands and Queries Per Feature
item.description: Learn how to apply CQRS with feature slices in C#. See how commands and queries fit into a feature-sliced .NET project without requiring MediatR or a complex framework. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/25/cqrs-with-feature-slices-in-c-commands-and-queries-per-feature

item.title: State Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master state pattern best practices in C# including transition management, guard conditions, state hierarchies, and organized state machine architectures. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/25/state-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability

item.title: C# Regex: Complete Guide to Regular Expressions in .NET
item.description: Master C# Regex with this complete guide covering pattern syntax, RegexOptions, GeneratedRegex, performance, and real .NET code examples. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/24/c-regex-complete-guide-to-regular-expressions-in-net

item.title: Command Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: Build a complete command pattern real-world example in C# with a text editor featuring undo/redo, command history, and macro recording. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/24/command-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: Feature Slicing vs Clean Architecture in C#: Which One Should You Use?
item.description: Compare feature slicing vs clean architecture in C#. Learn the tradeoffs, when each approach fits best, and how to combine them in .NET projects. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/23/feature-slicing-vs-clean-architecture-in-c-which-one-should-you-use

item.title: When to Use State Pattern in C#: Decision Guide with Examples
item.description: Discover when to use state pattern in C# with real decision criteria, use case examples, and guidance on when simpler alternatives work better. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/23/when-to-use-state-pattern-in-c-decision-guide-with-examples
